case_title: HAI BO CHOU VS. KEVIN TSANG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,015.02 FILED BY CHOU, HAI BO AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHOU, HAI BO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $80.00) SERVED JAN-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, KEVIN
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT - SC-100 PLAINTIFF CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS DO TO CLERICAL ERROR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 28, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG #300601, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOU, HAI BO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSANG, KEVIN $7,015.02 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,170.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TSANG, KEVIN
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-100 PLAINTIFF CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS DO TO CLERICAL ERROR HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
